<<<<<<< HEAD
<<<<<<< HEAD
---
title: "Davis_Burress_Zuo_Midterm_Project"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
date: "2026-03-01"
---

```{r}
DBZ_Data <- read.csv("DBZ_Data.csv")
```

```{r}
head(DBZ_Data)
summary(DBZ_Data) 
str(DBZ_Data)
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2) 
```

```{r}
ggplot(DBZ_Data, 
       aes(x = Days_Worked_Out, 
           y = Protein_Shake_Drank,
           color = Gender,
           shape = Gender)) +
  geom_jitter(width=.3, height = .3)
```


```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1, 2))

boxplot(Days_Worked_Out ~ Gender,
        data = DBZ_Data,
        main = "Days Worked Out",
        xlab = "Gender",
        ylab = "Count",
        col = c("lightpink", "lightblue"))

boxplot(Protein_Shake_Drank ~ Gender,
        data = DBZ_Data,
        main = "Protein Shakes Drank",
        xlab = "Gender",
        ylab = "Count",
        col = c("lightpink", "lightblue"))

```
